title: cirsium eriophorum subsp. richterianum
intro: Cirsium eriophorum subsp. richterianum, also known as the woolly thistle or woolly plume thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cirsium eriophorum subsp. richterianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
